name: Confluence to KB Curated Migration Workflow
serviceNowSurface: Integration Hub one-shot export plus KB authoring; Now Assist Q&A activation on curated scope
trigger: Knowledge manager initiates a migration cycle
businessOutcome: Move from a noisy 1200-page Confluence to a curated KB scope of ~250 articles with SME citation, suitable for grounding Now Assist Q&A.
steps: Run a one-shot Confluence export (Integration Hub) into a staging area.
Triage pages: keep (clear owner + recent + non-duplicate), merge (multiple pages on the same topic), retire (stale or duplicated).
For keep: produce KB drafts with chunking and metadata; SME citation mandatory.
For merge: produce a single draft from the source group; cite all SMEs and source pages.
For retire: archive the original metadata and rationale; do not import.
Set ACL recommendations per article; default private until justified.
SME approves drafts in batches; knowledge manager approves the final scope.
Activate Now Assist Q&A on the curated scope only after the gold-set precision passes.
approvalPoints: Knowledge manager approval of merge groups
Platform owner sign-off on Now Assist Q&A activation
failureStates: Stale page without SME contact: marked retire by default; flagged for re-validation later if needed.
Merge group with conflicting content: blocked at SME review; surfaced for resolution.
Gold-set precision below 85 percent: Q&A activation blocked; scope narrowed.
auditNotes: Mapping table from Confluence to KB retained.
Triage decisions retained with reviewer name and rationale.
Q&A activation event recorded in AI Control Tower.
tests: Stale page without SME does not enter the keep set.
Merge group drafts do not duplicate keep articles.
Gold-set precision validation runs before activation.
Audit retrieval of mapping and decisions completes within one business day.
